name: python3-pluggy
title: python3-pluggy
summary: plugin and hook calling mechanisms for Python 3
description:
plugin and hook calling mechanisms for Python 3
pluggy is the crystallized core of plugin management and hook calling for
pytest. It enables 1400+ plugins to extend and customize pytest’s default
behaviour. Even pytest itself is composed as a set of pluggy plugins which are
invoked in sequence according to a well defined set of protocols.
.
It gives users the ability to extend or modify the behaviour of a host program
by installing a plugin for that program. The plugin code will run as part of
normal program execution, changing or enhancing certain aspects of it.
.
This is the Python 3 library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pluggy because plugin and hook calling mechanisms for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pluggy as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pluggy with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pluggy --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
